description.en: Retrieve all bookings for the authenticated Cal.com user. Filter by status, date range, or event type.
description.de: Alle Buchungen für den authentifizierten Cal.com-Benutzer abrufen. Filtern nach Status, Datumsbereich oder Ereignistyp.
description.es: Retrieve all bookings for the authenticated Cal.com user. Filter by status, date range, or event type.
description.fr: Retrieve all bookings for the authenticated Cal.com user. Filter by status, date range, or event type.
description.ro: Retrieve all bookings for the authenticated Cal.com user. Filter by status, date range, or event type.
description.it: Retrieve all bookings for the authenticated Cal.com user. Filter by status, date range, or event type.

vars.API_KEY: env:CAL_COM_API_KEY|Get your API key from Cal.com Settings > Developer > API Keys at https://app.cal.com/settings/developer/api-keys

inputs.name: Event Type ID
inputs.bot: Optional event type ID to filter bookings by.

inputs.name: After Start

description.en: Only return bookings starting after this date (ISO 8601 UTC).
description.de: Nur Buchungen zurückgeben, die nach diesem Datum beginnen (ISO 8601 UTC).
description.es: Only return bookings starting after this date (ISO 8601 UTC).
description.fr: Only return bookings starting after this date (ISO 8601 UTC).
description.ro: Only return bookings starting after this date (ISO 8601 UTC).
description.it: Only return bookings starting after this date (ISO 8601 UTC).

inputs.bot: Filter to only return bookings starting after this UTC datetime, e.g. '2024-08-13T00:00:00Z'.
Number of bookings to return. Useful for pagination.
